inputs.label: Base Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: The standard price per unit before any bulk discount is applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard price per unit before any bulk discount is applied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplu indirim uygulanmadan önceki standart birim fiyatı.

inputs.label: Quantity Ordered
inputs.businessContext: The total number of units being purchased in a single order.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of units being purchased in a single order.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir siparişte satın alınan toplam birim sayısı.

inputs.label: Maximum Discount
inputs.businessContext: The upper limit of the discount percentage achievable with very large orders.

businessContext_i18n.en: The upper limit of the discount percentage achievable with very large orders.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çok büyük siparişlerde ulaşılabilen maksimum indirim yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Discount Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: The quantity at which the discount reaches approximately 63% of the maximum discount (i.e., the e-folding scale).

businessContext_i18n.en: The quantity at which the discount reaches approximately 63% of the maximum discount (i.e., the e-folding scale).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirimin maksimum indirimin yaklaşık %63'üne ulaştığı miktar (e-katlama ölçeği).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
